message:
feat(conformance): add structured logging, e2e forensics emitter, and parallel packet validation

Introduce ft-conformance-log-v1 structured logging contract with
deterministic scenario IDs, seeds, and replay commands attached to all
conformance case reports (scalar, dispatch, scheduler, serialization).

Add emit_e2e_forensics_matrix API and run_e2e_matrix CLI binary for
JSONL forensic output with packet-scoped filtering (--packet).

Parallelize packet validation in validate_phase2c_artifacts using
scoped threads with FT_DISABLE_PACKET_PARALLELISM env fallback.

Fix autograd tape borrow scope in apply_binary to avoid holding
immutable borrows across mutable node insertion.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
